name: GIGABYTE B550 UD AC ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4 x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - Realtek GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 802.11ac
shortName: GIGABYTE B550 UD AC ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset
description: ATX B550 motherboard for AMD AM4 socket with DDR4 and WiFi 5 connectivity.
